system: Agentic SOC Phishing Detection (LangGraph + LLM reasoning + tool simulation)
notes: Metrics computed from evaluate.py run with 40 held-out synthetic emails
Agentic system uses LLM-based reasoning node inside LangGraph
Threat + IOC + Memory signals are aggregated before final decision
VirusTotal is simulated via mock tool integration
Results may vary slightly across runs due to LLM variability
